title: Keeleco SE6701 Hedgehog 100% Recycled and Recyclable Toy Soft Cuddly, 18cm
features: ECO FRIENDLY - 100% RECYCLED - Environmentally friendly plush, made from 100% recycled plastic waste.

Head out into the garden with this cute hedgehog with delicate eyes. This 18cm eco-friendly plush toy from Keeleco is made from 100% recycled materials. Incredibly soft, kids will love cuddling and snuggling up on it. You will love imagining incredible adventures and making this cuddly toy a real toy. Convenient size and easy to carry.
Easy to wash: in case of small incidents, you only need to clean your plush toy with a damp cloth.
Complies with European standards: KEELECO items are made from high-quality materials and in accordance with European safety standards for toys.
